subject: move plugins from from ccsdk to dcaegen2
commit_message:
move plugins from from ccsdk to dcaegen2

copy dmaap, helm, pgaas and sshkeyshare plugins from ccsdk to dcaegen2

Change-Id: Ib257495de6c275c45f0c87a4b42ac21a2fab7979
Signed-off-by: Hansen, Tony (th1395) <th1395@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2207
Signed-off-by: Hansen, Tony (th1395) <th1395@att.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(14 comments)

Few general comments
- Parent pom (https://git.onap.org/dcaegen2/platform/plugins/tree/pom.xml) to be updated to include new submodules
- License updates to reflect 2020
- version update on pom.xml and setup.py
- sshkeyshare is not used/loaded in current deployment; this need not be migrated
